content_outline: Introduction: Why Landlords Bank on Tenants Giving Up
Know Your Rights: What Landlords Can and Cannot Deduct
State Deadlines: How Long Landlords Have to Return Your Deposit
The Power of a Formal Demand Letter
How Deposits-Back.com Works: 60 Seconds, $19.99, No Sign-Up
What to Do If Your Landlord Still Refuses
Conclusion: Stop Waiting and Start Demanding
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 30 days
Normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, and standard repainting are not legally deductible in most jurisdictions
A professionally written demand letter often resolves disputes without going to court
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific demand letters in 60 seconds for a flat $19.99 fee with no subscription or account required
Tenants who document move-out conditions and act within state timelines have the strongest claims
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord hold your money hostage. Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99 — no sign-up, no subscription, just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, delaying, or refusing to return security deposits and who need fast, affordable help without hiring an attorney.
